description_long: This is a single-bladed axe with a dark metallic head and a wooden handle. The blade is broad and slightly curved, with a pronounced edge and a flat poll on the opposite side. The handle is medium brown with visible golden decorative engravings or inlays running along its length, giving it an ornate appearance. The axe head is attached to the handle with a metallic collar, which also features decorative golden patterns. The handle is gently curved for ergonomic grip and ends in a rounded base. The overall design suggests a blend of functionality and decorative craftsmanship, suitable for display or practical use.
description: A decorative axe with a dark metal blade and a brown, engraved wooden handle, featuring gold accents and a curved ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe, highlighting the curved wooden handle and the broad, dark blade with gold detailing at the collar.
description_view_1: Front view showing the narrow edge of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle, with gold engravings visible along the shaft.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other face of the blade and handle, mirroring the ornate gold details and the blade's curvature.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the handle and the poll of the axe head, with the gold engravings running down the handle's length.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with gold engravings, rounded base, ergonomic grip, oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad blade with a curved edge, flat poll, and decorative gold collar; no beard.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with a decorative metallic collar.
